title: viola × paradoxa
intro: Viola × paradoxa, also known as the hybrid or false violet, is a plant species resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola pubescens. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Viola × paradoxa include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Herbal preparations of Viola × paradoxa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
